subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the hem of holiness! The letter sent to Jinab-i-Áqá Siyyid Taqí, upon him be the Glory of God, hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بذیل التقدیس مکتوب مرسول نزد جناب آقا سید تقی علیه بهاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
